I've tried Wheel Unseen too on nymph, but it's actually weaker for multiple reasons

- it cost 4, so you can't use it T1, and even as 2nd player, you can't combo it with a 3 cost 
- risky vs faint
- it will never beat the Epiphany + Ocean T1 combo, or Epiphany + Aoe poison + Taunt T1

when you're 2nd player

yes
If you're first player you can "only" Epi + Ocean (3 cost)
and if you can Epi Ocean T1, and Miasma T2, it's probably over unless he plays Tinct
Personally i think if you make a comp that has low arithmetica cost in general or can generate arithmetica, you can use other wheels for more damage
cost low equip big ?
I mean like instead of using something like epiphany that decreases skill cost of the character, you can use another wheel that can increases damage or other type of utility
But that can lead to hand clog(since you don't have epiphany to decrease cost) so the rest of the team should have low cost skills to prevent that or have arithmetica generating means
without epi, Miasma + proc poison cost 6
for exemple
